chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1822 of 2025 [Raja Depar v. Province of Sindh & others] Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3115/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.7423/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.04.2026 Mr. Abdul Azeem Abbasi, Advocate for Petitioner. == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Urgency granted. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. The grievance of the petitioner is that police officers of District Jamshoro are harassing the petitioner on false pretences even though the petitioner was acquitted in FIR No.13 of 2025 registered at PS Bhan. However, for such grievance the petitioner has an adequate remedy before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace under section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. Admittedly, the petitioner has not availed such remedy. Therefore the petition is dismissed leaving the petitioner to avail said remedy. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
